heading: OpenAI compatible API
subheading: Manage and configure your OpenAI API Compatible providers here.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: The base URL of the OpenAI API provider. eg (http://localhost:1234/v1)

modal.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?

model.title: Model List
model.subheading: Please select the chat models you want to use with this provider.

modal.tipLMStudio: Page Assist will automatically fetch the models you loaded on LM Studio. You don't need to add them manually.

projectId.label: Google Cloud Project ID
projectId.required: Please enter your Google Cloud project ID

serviceAccount.label: Service Account JSON
serviceAccount.required: Please paste your service account JSON or an access token
serviceAccount.help: Upload your service-account key file, or paste its JSON here. It is stored locally and used to mint short-lived access tokens in your browser. You can also paste a raw access token instead.
serviceAccount.invalid: That file is not valid JSON.

noNewModel: For LMStudio, Ollama, Llamafile, we fetch dynamically. No manual addition needed.

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this model?

noModelFound: No model found. Make sure you have added correct provider with base URL and API key.

radio.chatInfo: is used for chat completion and conversation generation
radio.embeddingInfo: is used for RAG and other semantic search related tasks.

modelAvatar.label: Model Avatar
modelAvatar.help: Please enter the URL of the model avatar. This image will be displayed in the chat window.
